user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new timeline event, so that key employee milestones are captured on the employee timeline
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Timeline screen; When I click Add new event and enter the module, event, description and timeline color; Then the event is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to associate a timeline event with a module and a parent event, so that events are organized in the correct context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a timeline event; When I select the module and parent event; Then the event is stored under that grouping

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to attach a document reference to a timeline event, so that supporting evidence is linked to the milestone
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a timeline event; When I specify a document; Then the document is associated with the event

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign a timeline color to each event, so that events are visually distinguishable on the timeline
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a timeline event; When I set the timeline color; Then the event is displayed in that color

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to preview a timeline event, so that I can confirm how it will appear before use
acceptance_criteria: Given timeline events exist; When I click Preview on an event; Then a preview of the event is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the timeline events list, so that I can access all configured events
acceptance_criteria: Given more than one page of events exists; When I use the pagination controls; Then the next set of events is shown
